data.title: Create eval for fix-bug skill (trigger routing and classification)
data.description:
Create a promptfoo eval for the fix-bug skill demonstrating correct trigger routing and bug classification.

## Implementation
- File: plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- Provider: anthropic:messages:claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 (cheapest viable)
- Grader: defaultTest.options.provider set to Haiku
- Test cases (at least 2):
  1. Given a test failure bug report, assert the skill classifies it as a test-failure bug and routes to TDD investigation path
  2. Given a runtime error bug report, assert the skill classifies it as a runtime bug and routes to the appropriate investigation path

### Assertion Strategy
Use llm-rubric assertions that verify correct routing:
- Does the skill correctly identify the bug type from the input? (classification accuracy)
- Does the skill select the correct investigation path for that type? (routing correctness)

## Test Exemption
test-exempt: declarative YAML config with no conditional logic. (1) no conditional logic, (2) test would only assert YAML structure, (3) purely eval configuration wiring.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Eval config exists
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- [ ] Config contains provider field
  Verify: grep -q 'provider:' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- [ ] Config contains at least 2 test cases
  Verify: grep -c 'assert:' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml | awk '{exit ($1 < 2)}'
- [ ] Config uses Haiku as grader
  Verify: grep -q 'haiku' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh

## Files to modify
- plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml (create)
